headline: How The Deere (DE) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Optimism Meets Valuation Concerns
summary: Deere's fair value anchor sits at US$665.10, with the latest update keeping that price target unchanged even as some inputs around growth and returns are refined. This stability comes while many analysts lift their price targets into the US$700s on the back of Q1 execution and raised guidance, and a smaller group questions whether the recent move in the stock already embeds an optimistic earnings path. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these mixed signals and keep up with the...

headline: Raymond James Raises its Price Target on Monolithic Power (MPWR)
summary: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) is one of the 10 Best Quality Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On May 1, 2026, Raymond James raised its price target on Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) to $1,800 from $1,350 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. headline: Truist Sees Stronger Q1 for Enterprise Products Partners (EPD) Despite Commodity Concerns
summary: Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE:EPD) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 4, Truist raised its price recommendation on Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE:EPD) to $40 from $36. It reiterated a Hold rating on the stock. The update came as part of a broader research note covering midstream energy […]
